title: Spear & Jackson 8090RS Razorsharp Telescopic Ratchet Bypass Lopper
features: Ratchet action for powerful, progressive cutting with twist and lock extendable mechanism
C50 carbon steel blades, hardened and tempered for durability
PTFE coated blade for rust resistance and smooth cutting
description: From the manufacturer Spear & Jackson Spear & Jackson has been selling hand, garden, contractors, agricultural and landscaping tools since 1760. The company was founded in the City of Sheffield, which is famous for the production of steel, cutlery and hand tools and continues to be our home over 250 years later. Telescopic Ratchet Bypass Lopper The Telescopic Bypass Lopper with bypass action minimises stem bruising for green stems with Ratchet action for powerful, progressive cutting and twist and lock extendable mechanism. The blades are constructed from C50 carbon steel blades which are hardened and tempered for durability and PTFE coated for rust resistance and smooth cutting. The lightweight aluminium handles feature non-slip comfort grips ensuring ease of use. Ratchet action for powerful, progressive cutting Twist and lock extendable mechanism C50 carbon steel blades, hardened and tempered for durability PTFE coated blade for rust resistance and smooth cutting Non-slip comfort grips Twist & Lock Handles Ratchet action for powerful, progressive cutting and twist and lock extendable mechanism. The lightweight aluminium handles also feature non-slip comfort grips ensuring ease of use Razorsharp Advantage The Razorsharp Advantage collection features the finest precision-cutting range of tools and is the obvious choice for gardeners who demand and expect precise, powerful performance C50 Carbon Steel The blades are constructed from C50 carbon steel blades which are hardened and tempered for durability and PTFE coated for rust resistance and smooth cutting Our Promise All Spear & Jackson products undergo rigorous quality inspection and testing. We cover against defects in manufacturing subject to wear and tear and the provision of reasonable care and maintenance. If you do have an issue with one of our products, please contact Amazon.co.uk customer services who will be happy to help.
